description: Open 'messy_concept_model.skp' in SketchUp Make 2017. The model contains a house, several trees, and solar panels, all improperly placed on 'Layer0'. Your task is to apply National CAD Standard (NCS) layers. First, open the Layers tray and create three new layers with exact names: 'A-BLDG', 'L-PLNT', and 'E-POWR-PV'. Then, use the Entity Info panel to assign the House group to 'A-BLDG', all Tree components to 'L-PLNT', and all Solar Panel components to 'E-POWR-PV'. Leave no top-level geometry on Layer0. Finally, save the organized model as 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\organized_ncs_model.skp'.
